title: combretaceae
intro: The Combretaceae rank refers to a family of flowering plants. It is a group of approximately 600 species of trees, shrubs, and vines found in tropical and subtropical regions around the world. The Combretaceae family is characterized by its showy flowers and distinctive fruits, often with a leathery texture. This family includes a diverse range of species, from the weeping fig and the bushwillow to the Combretum genus, which is often used as ornamental plants in landscaping.
